episodes.title: Lost on the road to enlightenment
episodes.description: So many of us have been told that meditation can make us less stressed, more productive, and happier. But for a small group of people, it has a dark side. What’s going on? Guests: Willoughby Britton , associate professor at Brown University; Richard Davidson , professor at the University of Wisconsin-Madison; Pierce Salguero , professor at the Abington College of Pennsylvania State University This episode was made in partnership with Vox’s ⁠Future Perfect⁠ team.
